requirement_topic.en: RURA / REG (EUCL) Grid-Connection Requirements — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116), Grid Parameters 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V, and EUCL Connection Approval
requirement_topic.zh: RURA / REG（EUCL）并网要求——防孤岛（IEC 62116）、电网参数50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V及EUCL接入审批
requirement_topic.zht: RURA / REG（EUCL）併網要求——防孤島（IEC 62116）、電網參數50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V及EUCL接入審批

summary.en: Rwanda's electricity grid operates at 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The Rwanda Energy Group (REG) operates through two subsidiaries: EUCL (Energy Utility Corporation Limited) for transmission, distribution, and grid connection; and EDCL (Energy Development Corporation Limited) for generation development. Grid-tied PV inverters must comply with RURA (Rwanda Utilities Regulatory Authority) licensing conditions and EUCL's technical connection requirements. Key IEC standards expected for grid-tied inverter compliance include: IEC 62116 (anti-islanding — inverter must detect loss of mains and disconnect within prescribed limits); IEC 61727 (characteristics of the utility interface for photovoltaic systems — voltage and frequency trip limits); and IEC 62109-1/-2 (safety). RURA holds the statutory licensing authority over electricity generators and distributors including solar mini-grid operators. Utility-scale projects (e.g. the Rwamagana solar plant developed under REG/EDCL) reference IEC standards in project specifications. Note: Rwanda does not publish a single consolidated PV grid-code equivalent to Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1; requirements are distributed across RURA regulations, EUCL connection conditions, and project-level specifications.
summary.zh: 卢旺达电网运行参数为单相230 V、三相400 V、50 Hz。卢旺达能源集团（REG）通过两家子公司运营：EUCL（能源公用事业有限公司）负责输配电和并网接入；EDCL（能源开发有限公司）负责发电开发。并网光伏逆变器须符合RURA（卢旺达公用事业监管局）许可条件及EUCL技术接入要求。并网逆变器合规预期适用的主要IEC标准包括：IEC 62116（防孤岛——逆变器须在规定限值内检测电网失电并断开）；IEC 61727（光伏系统公用电网接口特性——电压和频率跳闸限值）；IEC 62109-1/-2（安全）。RURA对电力发电商和分销商（包括太阳能微网运营商）享有法定许可授权。公用事业规模项目（如REG/EDCL下开发的Rwamagana太阳能电站）在项目规格中引用IEC标准。注意：卢旺达尚未发布相当于Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1的单一完整光伏并网规范；相关要求分散于RURA法规、EUCL接入条件和项目级规格中。
summary.zht: 盧旺達電網運行參數為單相230 V、三相400 V、50 Hz。盧旺達能源集團（REG）通過兩家子公司運營：EUCL（能源公用事業有限公司）負責輸配電和併網接入；EDCL（能源開發有限公司）負責發電開發。併網光伏逆變器須符合RURA（盧旺達公用事業監管局）許可條件及EUCL技術接入要求。併網逆變器合規預期適用的主要IEC標準包括：IEC 62116（防孤島——逆變器須在規定限值內偵測電網失電並斷開）；IEC 61727（光伏系統公用電網介面特性——電壓和頻率跳閘限值）；IEC 62109-1/-2（安全）。RURA對電力發電商和分銷商（包括太陽能微網運營商）享有法定許可授權。公用事業規模項目（如REG/EDCL下開發的Rwamagana太陽能電站）在項目規格中引用IEC標準。注意：盧旺達尚未發布相當於Kahramaa EP-EPP-P7-S1的單一完整光伏併網規範；相關要求分散於RURA法規、EUCL接入條件和項目級規格中。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
RURA (Rwanda Utilities Regulatory Authority) — electricity sector licensing regulations
REG/EUCL — Energy Utility Corporation Limited grid connection conditions

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004 (inverter technical specifications), GB/T 37408-2019 (technical requirements for PV grid-connected inverters), and domestic anti-islanding test results. These Chinese grid-connection documents are based on Chinese grid conditions (220/380 V at 50 Hz under GB/T 156) and are not automatically accepted as EUCL or RURA grid-connection evidence. Rwanda's grid operates at 230/400 V at 50 Hz — a nominal voltage level higher than China's 220/380 V — meaning inverter firmware protection thresholds and reconnection settings validated for Chinese conditions require re-validation for Rwanda's grid parameters before installation.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004（逆变器技术规范）、GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）及国内防孤岛测试结果。上述中国并网文件基于中国电网条件（依据GB/T 156为50 Hz 220/380 V），不自动被EUCL或RURA接受为并网证据。卢旺达电网运行参数为50 Hz 230/400 V——标称电压高于中国220/380 V——因此针对中国条件验证的逆变器固件保护阈值和重连设置，在安装前须重新针对卢旺达电网参数进行验证。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004（逆變器技術規範）、GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）及國內防孤島測試結果。上述中國併網文件基於中國電網條件（依據GB/T 156為50 Hz 220/380 V），不自動被EUCL或RURA接受為併網證據。盧旺達電網運行參數為50 Hz 230/400 V——標稱電壓高於中國220/380 V——因此針對中國條件驗證的逆變器韌體保護閾值和重連設置，在安裝前須重新針對盧旺達電網參數進行驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages) — China grid: 220/380 V at 50 Hz
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not satisfy EUCL/RURA Rwanda grid-connection requirements. Exporters must prepare: (a) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (b) IEC 61727 interface compliance evidence; (c) firmware configuration validated for Rwanda's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid — not the 220/380 V Chinese grid parameters; (d) RURA licensing confirmation for the project operator where applicable; (e) EUCL grid connection application and technical review documentation where a grid-tied project is involved. Additionally, for off-grid and solar home system (SHS) applications, product quality standards such as IEC 62509 (battery charge controllers) and VeraSol/Lighting Global quality standards may apply depending on the product and financing programme involved.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T并网文件不满足EUCL/RURA卢旺达并网要求。出口商须准备：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告；（b）IEC 61727接口合规证据；（c）针对卢旺达230/400 V、50 Hz电网验证的固件配置，而非中国220/380 V电网参数；（d）适用情况下的项目运营商RURA许可确认；（e）涉及并网项目时的EUCL并网申请及技术审查文件。此外，对于离网和太阳能家庭系统（SHS）应用，根据产品和融资计划，可能适用IEC 62509（蓄电池充电控制器）及VeraSol/光明全球（Lighting Global）质量标准等产品质量标准。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T併網文件不滿足EUCL/RURA盧旺達併網要求。出口商須準備：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島測試報告；（b）IEC 61727介面合規證據；（c）針對盧旺達230/400 V、50 Hz電網驗證的韌體配置，而非中國220/380 V電網參數；（d）適用情況下的項目運營商RURA許可確認；（e）涉及併網項目時的EUCL併網申請及技術審查文件。此外，對於離網和太陽能家庭系統（SHS）應用，根據產品和融資計畫，可能適用IEC 62509（蓄電池充電控制器）及VeraSol/Lighting Global品質標準等產品品質標準。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-tied connection under EUCL/RURA requirements; RURA licensing is a statutory requirement for electricity generation and mini-grid operation in Rwanda; IEC 62116 anti-islanding is expected as part of grid-connection technical compliance
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's grid operator requirements but does not transfer to Rwanda EUCL/RURA grid-connection acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Rwanda's EUCL/RURA grid-connection requirements reference IEC standards including IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 — none of which are covered by Chinese GB/T grid certificates. Re-parameterise inverter firmware for Rwanda's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid before installation and document the configuration. Obtain RURA licensing confirmation for the project operator. Verify current EUCL technical connection conditions and RURA licensing requirements directly with RURA (rura.rw) and REG/EUCL (reg.rw) before finalising the equipment compliance package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 卢旺达EUCL/RURA并网要求引用IEC标准，包括IEC 62116和IEC 61727——上述均未被中国GB/T并网证书覆盖。安装前须将逆变器固件重新参数化为卢旺达230/400 V 50 Hz电网参数，并记录配置。取得项目运营商的RURA许可确认。在最终确定设备合规包前，请直接向RURA（rura.rw）和REG/EUCL（reg.rw）核实现行EUCL技术接入条件和RURA许可要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 盧旺達EUCL/RURA併網要求引用IEC標準，包括IEC 62116和IEC 61727——上述均未被中國GB/T併網證書覆蓋。安裝前須將逆變器韌體重新參數化為盧旺達230/400 V 50 Hz電網參數，並記錄配置。取得項目運營商的RURA許可確認。在最終確定設備合規包前，請直接向RURA（rura.rw）和REG/EUCL（reg.rw）核實現行EUCL技術接入條件和RURA許可要求。

requirement_topic.en: RSB Import Conformity Verification — Pre-Export / Pre-Shipment Inspection Regime for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: RSB进口合格验证——光伏逆变器出口前/装运前检验制度
requirement_topic.zht: RSB進口合格驗證——光伏逆變器出口前／裝運前檢驗制度

summary.en: Rwanda Standards Board (RSB) is the national standards and conformity assessment body. RSB operates a Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme for regulated products imported into Rwanda. Under the PVoC regime, covered products require a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) issued by an RSB-appointed inspection agent before shipment. The list of regulated products under Rwanda's compulsory standards is subject to revision by RSB; solar PV equipment including inverters may be captured depending on the applicable RSB compulsory standard (RS) designation. Importers and exporters should confirm whether solar PV inverters fall within the current RSB regulated product list and, if so, which RSB compulsory standard applies and which RSB-appointed inspection body is authorised to issue the CoC. RSB also adopts IEC standards as Rwanda Standards (RS) — relevant adoptions include equivalents of IEC 62109, IEC 62116, and IEC 61727.
summary.zh: 卢旺达标准局（RSB）是国家标准和合格评定机构。RSB对进口至卢旺达的受监管产品实施出口前合格验证（PVoC）计划。在PVoC制度下，覆盖产品须在装运前由RSB指定检验机构签发合格证书（CoC）。卢旺达强制性标准下的受监管产品清单由RSB定期修订；太阳能光伏设备（包括逆变器）是否被纳入，取决于适用的RSB强制性标准（RS）指定。进口商和出口商应确认太阳能光伏逆变器是否属于现行RSB受监管产品清单，如属于，须核实适用的RSB强制性标准及RSB授权的CoC签发检验机构。RSB亦将IEC标准采纳为卢旺达标准（RS），相关采纳标准包括IEC 62109、IEC 62116和IEC 61727的对应版本。
summary.zht: 盧旺達標準局（RSB）是國家標準和合格評定機構。RSB對進口至盧旺達的受監管產品實施出口前合格驗證（PVoC）計畫。在PVoC制度下，涵蓋產品須在裝運前由RSB指定檢驗機構簽發合格證書（CoC）。盧旺達強制性標準下的受監管產品清單由RSB定期修訂；太陽能光伏設備（包括逆變器）是否被納入，取決於適用的RSB強制性標準（RS）指定。進口商和出口商應確認太陽能光伏逆變器是否屬於現行RSB受監管產品清單，如屬於，須核實適用的RSB強制性標準及RSB授權的CoC簽發檢驗機構。RSB亦將IEC標準採納為盧旺達標準（RS），相關採納標準包括IEC 62109、IEC 62116和IEC 61727的對應版本。

standards_or_laws: RSB (Rwanda Standards Board) — PVoC Pre-Export Verification of Conformity programme
Rwanda Compulsory Standards (RS) — applicable RS designations for PV inverters (confirm with RSB)

summary.en: China does not have a mandatory export certification regime specifically covering PV inverters for export to Rwanda. Chinese PV inverters are certified under voluntary schemes (CQC, CGC) referencing GB/T 37408 and related domestic standards. Chinese export documentation (test reports, voluntary certificates) based on domestic GB/T standards are not automatically accepted by RSB as evidence of conformity with Rwanda's compulsory RS standards. Where RSB PVoC applies, the Chinese exporter must engage an RSB-appointed inspection agent in China to conduct pre-shipment verification against the applicable RS standard — GB/T certificates do not substitute for this.
summary.zh: 中国没有专门针对出口卢旺达光伏逆变器的强制性出口认证制度。中国光伏逆变器依据参考GB/T 37408及相关国内标准的自愿性计划（CQC、CGC）认证。基于国内GB/T标准的中国出口文件（测试报告、自愿性证书）不自动被RSB接受为符合卢旺达强制性RS标准的证据。如RSB PVoC适用，中国出口商须在中国委托RSB指定检验机构，针对适用RS标准进行装运前验证——GB/T证书不能替代此要求。
summary.zht: 中國沒有專門針對出口盧旺達光伏逆變器的強制性出口認證制度。中國光伏逆變器依據參考GB/T 37408及相關國內標準的自願性計畫（CQC、CGC）認證。基於國內GB/T標準的中國出口文件（測試報告、自願性證書）不自動被RSB接受為符合盧旺達強制性RS標準的證據。如RSB PVoC適用，中國出口商須在中國委託RSB指定檢驗機構，針對適用RS標準進行裝運前驗證——GB/T證書不能替代此要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — voluntary
CQC / CGC — voluntary Chinese PV inverter certification schemes

gap.en: Gap: Chinese voluntary GB/T-based certification does not satisfy RSB PVoC requirements where PVoC applies to PV inverters. Exporters should: (a) confirm with RSB whether solar PV inverters are on the current regulated product list requiring a CoC; (b) if captured, engage an RSB-appointed inspection agent in China for pre-shipment inspection and CoC issuance; (c) ensure the inverter's technical documentation references the applicable RS standard rather than solely GB/T. IEC 62109-1/-2 test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory are likely to be required as the underlying conformity evidence since RSB RS standards are adopted from IEC.
gap.zh: 差距：在RSB PVoC适用于光伏逆变器的情况下，基于GB/T的中国自愿性认证不满足RSB PVoC要求。出口商应：（a）向RSB确认太阳能光伏逆变器是否在需要提交CoC的当前受监管产品清单中；（b）如被纳入，在中国委托RSB指定检验机构进行装运前检验和CoC签发；（c）确保逆变器技术文件引用适用的RS标准，而不仅仅是GB/T。来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2测试报告很可能被要求作为基础合规证据，因为RSB RS标准采纳自IEC。
gap.zht: 差距：在RSB PVoC適用於光伏逆變器的情況下，基於GB/T的中國自願性認證不滿足RSB PVoC要求。出口商應：（a）向RSB確認太陽能光伏逆變器是否在需要提交CoC的當前受監管產品清單中；（b）如被納入，在中國委託RSB指定檢驗機構進行裝運前檢驗和CoC簽發；（c）確保逆變器技術文件引用適用的RS標準，而不僅僅是GB/T。來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2測試報告很可能被要求作為基礎合規證據，因為RSB RS標準採納自IEC。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where RSB PVoC applies to PV inverters under the current regulated product list — confirm coverage directly with RSB before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese voluntary certifications (CQC/CGC under GB/T 37408) do not confer any presumption of conformity with RSB compulsory standards

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Rwanda's RSB PVoC regime may require a Certificate of Conformity for PV inverters before shipment from China. Chinese GB/T-based voluntary certifications do not satisfy RSB conformity requirements. Confirm whether solar PV inverters are on the current RSB regulated product list and identify the applicable RS standard and RSB-appointed inspection agent directly with RSB (rsb.gov.rw) before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 卢旺达RSB PVoC制度可能要求光伏逆变器在从中国装运前取得合格证书。基于GB/T的中国自愿性认证不满足RSB合格要求。在装运前，请直接向RSB（rsb.gov.rw）确认太阳能光伏逆变器是否在现行RSB受监管产品清单中，并确认适用的RS标准和RSB指定检验机构。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 盧旺達RSB PVoC制度可能要求光伏逆變器在從中國裝運前取得合格證書。基於GB/T的中國自願性認證不滿足RSB合格要求。在裝運前，請直接向RSB（rsb.gov.rw）確認太陽能光伏逆變器是否在現行RSB受監管產品清單中，並確認適用的RS標準和RSB指定檢驗機構。
